name: Pamela Denise Long
bio: Pamela Denise Long is an occupational therapist from Illinois running as a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate seat being vacated by Sen. Dick Durbin. She is one of the lower-profile candidates in the field, raising $18,404 through December 2025 (including $2,638 in personal funds) with $1,952 cash on hand heading into the primary. Long participated in a WBEZ undercard forum with lower-polling candidates from both parties in the cycle. Very limited public profile or campaign presence documented.

jacket.note: FEC data as of Dec 31, 2025. Includes $2,638 self-funded by Long. Near-zero campaign resources.

career_history.highlight: Healthcare background as an occupational therapist; no prior elected office.
